# Support

Sentinel is a community-maintained open-source project. Support is best-effort; there is no response-time or resolution-time guarantee.

## Where to ask

- Use the [issue chooser](https://github.com/Borda/vision-delivery/issues/new/choose) for reproducible bugs and actionable suggestions.
- Use a private [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/Borda/vision-delivery/security/advisories/new) for suspected vulnerabilities. Do not file security findings publicly.

External pull requests are temporarily limited while the project fortifies CI coverage and contribution rules. Do not post credentials, private media, customer data, faces, license plates, medical data, proprietary dataset samples, or logs you are not authorized to share. Reduce a report to a synthetic or redacted reproducer whenever possible.

## What to include

- Sentinel version or commit identifier.
- Host and host version: Codex or Claude Code.
- Operating system and runtime versions.
- The exact command or prompt, expected behavior, and actual behavior.
- A minimal public-safe fixture or transcript.
- Whether Roboflow MCP was authenticated and which capability was attempted, without credentials or private identifiers.

## Support boundary

This project supports Sentinel's routing, workflow, documentation, local scripts, and repository-owned plugin integration. Roboflow account access, service availability, model IDs, Workflows, plan limits, billing, and current platform behavior belong to Roboflow's official support and documentation.

See the [compatibility policy](../docs/compatibility.md) for validated hosts and [Support, Scope, and Evidence](../docs/support-and-scope.md) for the difference between proven, guided, delegated, and expert-required work.

## No production warranty

Maintainer guidance, generated artifacts, benchmarks, and example thresholds are not production certification. The user remains responsible for data authority, security review, domain validation, monitoring, and final acceptance.
